  "title": "Sales Executive",
  "description": "Property Question Nigeria Limited originated in 2007 as Pro Marketing Consult, a professional marketing consultancy. In 2020, the real estate component of the business was separated from the consultancy and began operating as Property Question Nigeria Limited. The company was formally incorporated as a private limited liability entity by the Corporate Affairs Commission of Nigeria in the year 2025.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Executive
Job Location: Ogba, Lagos (Hybrid)
Employment Type: Contract

What You Will Do


	Promote Participation: Present and market our Land Banking Scheme, highlighting its potential for capital appreciation and portfolio diversification.
	Generate and Convert Leads: Collaborate with the sales team to identify, qualify, and convert enquiries into successful participation in our scheme.
	Safeguard Brand Integrity: Ensure all communications reflect the professionalism and prestige of our organisation.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a B.Sc Degree with 0 - 3 years of work experience.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: propertyquestionnigeria@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Phone Card, Data Subscription and Transportation Allowance would be given on weekly or monthly basis.",

Sales Executive Job at Property Question Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Property Question Nigeria Limited originated in 2007 as Pro Marketing Consult, a professional marketing consultancy. In 2020, the real estate component of the business was separated from the consultancy and began operating as Property Question Nigeria Limited. The company was formally incorporated as a private limited liability entity by the Corporate Affairs Commission of Nigeria in the year 2025.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Executive
Job Location: Ogba, Lagos (Hybrid)
Employment Type: Contract

What You Will Do
     

            
    




	Promote Participation: Present and market our Land Banking Scheme, highlighting its potential for capital appreciation and portfolio diversification.
	Generate and Convert Leads: Collaborate with the sales team to identify, qualify, and convert enquiries into successful participation in our scheme.
	Safeguard Brand Integrity: Ensure all communications reflect the professionalism and prestige of our organisation.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a B.Sc Degree with 0 - 3 years of work experience.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Phone Card, Data Subscription and Transportation Allowance would be given on weekly or monthly basis.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Admin Assistant Job at Get Healthy Inc.




        
    

        
        Get Healthy Inc. is a premier health, wellness, and natural products distributor headquartered in Barbados, serving as a vital supply and retail hub across the Caribbean. The company acts as the core administrative and legal "Data Controller" behind major regional wellness brands, most notably the prominent health food retail chain Nature’s Discount.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Admin Assistant

Job Location: Nigeria

Requirement
     

            
    




	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications.


Method of application 
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: If you're passionate about health and wellness, we want to hear from you!    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Development Officer",
  "description": "Preswin Nigeria Limited is an indigenous company that process and manufacture well packaged water, fruit Juice, bottling, paper products and general merchant company.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Officer

Job Location: Asaba, Delta

&lrm;Job Description


	&lrm;We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced Business Development Officer to drive growth and expansion in the beverages and packaging solutions sector.
	&lrm;The successful candidate will identify new business opportunities, build relationships with key clients, and develop strategies to increase market share.


&lrm;Responsibilities


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities in the beverages and packaging solutions sector.
	&lrm;Build and maintain relationships with key clients, including manufacturers, distributors, and retailers.
	&lrm;Collaborate with cross-functional teams to develop and launch new products and services.
	&lrm;Negotiate and close deals to achieve revenue targets.
	&lrm;Develop and implement business growth strategies to increase market share.
	&lrm;Conduct market research and analyze industry trends to stay ahead of competitors.
	Provide excellent customer service and support to clients.


&lrm;Requirements
Education:


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Business, Marketing, or related field.


&lrm;Experience:


	&lrm; 3+ years of experience in business development, sales, or marketing in the beverages or packaging industry.
	&lrm;&lrm;Strong knowledge of the beverages and packaging solutions market.


&lrm;Skills:


	&lrm;Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	&lrm;Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and meet deadlines.
	&lrm;Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	&lrm;Ability to travel (up to 50%).


Method of application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: Preswinnigerialtd@yahoo.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Business Development Officer Job at Preswin Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Preswin Nigeria Limited is an indigenous company that process and manufacture well packaged water, fruit Juice, bottling, paper products and general merchant company.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Officer

Job Location: Asaba, Delta

‎Job Description
     

            
    




	‎We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced Business Development Officer to drive growth and expansion in the beverages and packaging solutions sector.
	‎The successful candidate will identify new business opportunities, build relationships with key clients, and develop strategies to increase market share.


‎Responsibilities


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities in the beverages and packaging solutions sector.
	‎Build and maintain relationships with key clients, including manufacturers, distributors, and retailers.
	‎Collaborate with cross-functional teams to develop and launch new products and services.
	‎Negotiate and close deals to achieve revenue targets.
	‎Develop and implement business growth strategies to increase market share.
	‎Conduct market research and analyze industry trends to stay ahead of competitors.
	Provide excellent customer service and support to clients.


‎Requirements
Education:


	Bachelor's Degree in Business, Marketing, or related field.


‎Experience:


	‎ 3+ years of experience in business development, sales, or marketing in the beverages or packaging industry.
	‎‎Strong knowledge of the beverages and packaging solutions market.


‎Skills:


	‎Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	‎Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and meet deadlines.
	‎Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	‎Ability to travel (up to 50%).


Method of application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Marketing Coordinator Job at Get Healthy Inc




        
    

        
        Get Healthy Inc. is a premier health, wellness, and natural products distributor headquartered in Barbados, serving as a vital supply and retail hub across the Caribbean. The company acts as the core administrative and legal "Data Controller" behind major regional wellness brands, most notably the prominent health food retail chain Nature’s Discount.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Coordinator

Job Location: Nigeria

Requirement
     

            
    




	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications.


Method of Application 
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: If you're passionate about health and wellness, we want to hear from you!    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Female Business Development Officer",
  "description": "CME Engineering Limited is a reputable company specializing in Mechanical and Electrical Engineering and Contracting services. Founded with a clear vision to deliver exceptional engineering solutions, we have consistently executed projects that uphold the highest standards of quality, innovation, and client satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female Business Development Officer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a proactive and results-driven Female Business Development Officer to identify new business opportunities, build strong client relationships, and drive revenue growth.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for expanding our customer base and supporting the company&rsquo;s overall growth objectives.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities and leads
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients and partners
	Conduct market research to identify trends and growth opportunities
	Prepare proposals, presentations, and business pitches
	Negotiate and close deals to meet revenue targets
	Follow up on leads and ensure customer satisfaction
	Prepare regular business development and sales reports.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree with a minimum of 2 years of experience in business development, sales, or a related role.
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills
	Proven ability to meet or exceed sales targets
	Good understanding of the Lagos business environment
	Proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
	Self-motivated, confident, and results-oriented.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: jane@cmeeng.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more information WhatsApp: 0814 075 6552.",

Female Business Development Officer Job at CME Engineering Limited




        
    

        
        CME Engineering Limited is a reputable company specializing in Mechanical and Electrical Engineering and Contracting services. Founded with a clear vision to deliver exceptional engineering solutions, we have consistently executed projects that uphold the highest standards of quality, innovation, and client satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female Business Development Officer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are seeking a proactive and results-driven Female Business Development Officer to identify new business opportunities, build strong client relationships, and drive revenue growth.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for expanding our customer base and supporting the company’s overall growth objectives.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities and leads
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients and partners
	Conduct market research to identify trends and growth opportunities
	Prepare proposals, presentations, and business pitches
	Negotiate and close deals to meet revenue targets
	Follow up on leads and ensure customer satisfaction
	Prepare regular business development and sales reports.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with a minimum of 2 years of experience in business development, sales, or a related role.
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills
	Proven ability to meet or exceed sales targets
	Good understanding of the Lagos business environment
	Proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
	Self-motivated, confident, and results-oriented.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more information WhatsApp: 0814 075 6552.    

    

        Click here to Apply
